data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Apple's website uses a globally distributed infrastructure to ensure high availability and performance.
data.technical_spec: Content Delivery Network (CDN), Load Balancing, Cloud-based Servers

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: The site is optimized to ensure compatibility and usability across various devices and screen sizes.

data.title: Progressive Web Applications (PWA)
data.description: Utilizes PWA features to enhance the web experience akin to native apps.
data.technical_spec: Service Workers, Responsive, App Shell Model

data.title: API-Driven Content Management
data.description: Leverages APIs for dynamic content delivery and seamless integration across platforms.

data.title: High-Performance Web Standards
data.description: Employs modern web standards to optimize loading times and site performance.
